title: Selling Online Without Gumroad: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a creator living in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, and you want to sell digital products online without Gumroad because it's blocked in your country. You're not alone. Many creators face similar restrictions due to PayPal, Stripe, and Payhip's country limitations, forcing them to look for alternative solutions. In this post, we'll compare the pros and cons of selling online without Gumroad and explore a permanent structural alternative using crypto-native infrastructure.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad, PayPal, Stripe, and Payhip provide a conventional payment gateway for digital creators to sell their products. However, they have country-specific restrictions that block users in certain regions. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure like NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offer a decentralized payment system that enables global transactions without KYC requirements. The Full Stack Bundle includes Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, providing a comprehensive solution for creators to manage their digital stores,
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Gumroad, PayPal, Stripe, and Payhip exclude specific countries from their services due to regulatory requirements, such as anti-money laundering and know-your-customer (KYC) regulations. This means creators from restricted countries cannot use these platforms to sell their digital products. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure like NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle operate on a decentralized network, allowing creators to accept payments from anywhere in the world without worrying about KYC requirements or country-specific restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment gateways like PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for transactions, ranging from 2.9% + 30¢ to 2.4% + 30¢, respectively. Additionally, they often have delayed payment processing, which can take several days. In contrast, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offer instant automated delivery and payment processing, with transparent fees starting at 0.5%. This means creators can receive their payments quickly and without incurring hefty fees.
Crypto-native infrastructure is the permanent structural alternative to traditional payment gateways for creators in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Gumroad, PayPal, Stripe, and Payhip require manual intervention for payment processing and delivery. This can lead to delayed or lost sales, especially for creators who are new to online sales. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers automated delivery and payment processing, ensuring that creators can focus on producing high-quality digital products while Unchained Commerce handles the logistics. With the Full Stack Bundle, creators can set up their digital stores quickly and efficiently, with automated delivery and payment processing included.
